explanation: The user wants all potatoes to be placed in the cabinet. Since no specific potatoes are mentioned in the discussed_objects, I assume there are multiple potatoes available. I will pick up each potato one by one and place it in the cabinet. The plan follows the standard procedure of picking up an object and placing it in a receptacle, ensuring that only one object is held at a time. The suffix _0, _1, _2 is used for the potatoes as they are new objects and not referenced in the current state.
